title: Sour Crunchy Vegan Cheese Crumble
description: This dish combines the indulgent flavors of sour colby jack cheese with a crunchy texture for a Peruvian-style vegan treat.

ingredients.name: Vegan Colby Jack Cheese, drained and crumbled
Honey or Agave Nectar for sweetness
Toppings (optional): Sliced Jalapenos, Cilantro, Lime Juice
ingredients.notes: Adjust quantity based on preference and heat tolerance

instructions: In a bowl, mix crumbled vegan cheese with almond milk until smooth.
Add coconut oil, honey/agave nectar, and ground flaxseed into the cheese mixture. Mix well to combine.
Pour mixture onto a greased baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Serve warm with additional cilantro and lime juice as garnish.
